title: echo ProcessTemplate() — deprecated output pattern
description: ProcessTemplate() output is echoed directly instead of using the modern template rendering API. Note: echo $this->ProcessTemplate() is extremely common in CMSMS modules and is functionally correct, just not the modern pattern.
explanation: echo $this->ProcessTemplate() is the CMSMS 1.x pattern. Modern CMSMS uses ProcessTemplateFromDatabase() or Smarty's fetch() method.
